Welcome Gemma 4: Frontier multimodal intelligence on device

Published April 2, 2026 Update on GitHub
Upvote 745 +739 merve Follow

Table of Contents Overview of Capabilities and Architecture Deploy Anywhere What is new with Gemma 4?

The Gemma 4 family of multimodal models is now available with support for agents, inference engines, and fine-tuning libraries used by the open-source AI community.

These models are designed to run across laptops, edge devices, and cloud deployments, giving teams a practical path to ship multimodal experiences without locking themselves into a single runtime.

Hugging Face and its partners also highlighted that developers can move from experimentation to deployment with a consistent toolchain for transformers, local runtimes, and browser-side inference.
